The '''Beshqek system''', also known as the '''Byss system''', was the home system of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] planet [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{System-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan 1|''Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan'' 1]]

*{{DoD|The Queen of Air and Darkness}} {{Mo}}
*{{DoD|Jaws of the Sarlacc}}
